name: MEDA PRUDHVENATH
message:
Dear Team,

Greetings from Andhra Pradesh.

I am interested in starting an EV Charging Station in partnership with Relux Electric. I have identified a strategic highway-side location in Chagalamarri Tollgate, Nandyal District, Andhra Pradesh which has good vehicle movement and future growth potential.

I would like to explore your EV charging franchise/business model and understand how we can collaborate. I am particularly interested in the following details:

Investment requirements and ROI
Types of chargers suitable for highway locations
Site feasibility and approval process
Installation, maintenance, and operational support
Revenue sharing or franchise model

I am planning this as a long-term business and also looking to scale to multiple locations in the future.

Kindly share the next steps to proceed further. I am available for a call or meeting at your convenience.

Thank you for your time and support.

Warm regards,
Meda Prudhveenath

I own a private property located at coordinates 26°21'01.3"N, 80°40'59.4"E in Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh (Allahabad region), and I am interested in setting up a public EV charging station under the PM E-DRIVE scheme.

I would like to partner with Relux Electric for the STD 120 KW model as part of a franchise arrangement. My property has public road access and is suitable for high-capacity EV charging infrastructure.

I am actively exploring the PM E-DRIVE central government subsidy (80% on upstream infrastructure) and the UP State EV Policy capital subsidy (20% on fixed capital investment). I would appreciate your guidance on:

1. Site feasibility assessment for my Prayagraj location
2. Relux Electric's CPO empanelment status under PM E-DRIVE
3. Support provided for subsidy documentation and application
4. Revenue sharing / franchise model details

Please contact me at your earliest convenience to discuss next steps.

name: Bharath
message:
We are Kwontum, an EV mobility startup based in Bengaluru having a fleet of Mahindra XUV 400's and currently procuring BYD eMAX7 electric vehicles and expect to continue adding vehicles to our fleet on a regular, monthly basis. As part of this, we are receiving Relux AC chargers with the vehicles, and this has given us a good opportunity to explore a deeper and more long-term association with your team.

Looking ahead, we’re keen to understand how we could potentially work together beyond individual chargers. Specifically, we’re interested in learning more about your capabilities around OCPP-enabled chargers, public charging setups, and fast charging solutions, as we are evaluating plans to open a public EV charging hub near an airport in the near future.

At a high level, we’d love to get clarity on:

OCPP support and backend / CMS integration options for your chargers

Details of your DC fast charger range and their suitability for public use

How Relux typically supports public or semi-public charging deployments

Commercial models for customers with ongoing and recurring requirements

This is still at an early exploration stage for us, but we see strong potential to build something meaningful and scalable together. It would be great to connect over a short call to understand this better and see if there’s a good fit on both sides.

name: Shubham Goyal
message:
Dear Relux EV Charging Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am writing to express my interest in becoming a partner with Relux for the establishment and operation of electric vehicle (EV) charging stations. With the rapid growth of EV adoption in India, I am keen to contribute to the expansion of reliable and accessible charging infrastructure in collaboration with a trusted industry leader like Relux.

I would appreciate the opportunity to understand the partnership models, technical requirements, commercial terms, and onboarding process for setting up Relux EV charging stations. I am confident that a collaboration could be mutually beneficial and support the shared vision of sustainable mobility.

Kindly let me know the next steps or the appropriate contact person to take this discussion forward. I would be happy to share further details and participate in a meeting at your convenience.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to your response.
